prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 6937→7723→10637→10972→13403 名，呈持续后移趋势，近 5 年累计后移约 6466 名，年均后移约 1600 名；2025 年基准位次约 13403 名，后移趋势明显；该校在福建省物理类招生计划：2021–2022 年均为 74 人，2023 年 75 人，2024 年 78 人，2025 年 74 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 83 人，较 2025 年扩招约 12.16%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有显著缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南财经政法大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021 年第 65 名→2026 年第 57 名，近年排名稳步提升，体现学校综合实力增强；2025 年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（教授因考核不合格发\"罪己诏\"引发质疑），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第 73，评价为\"一般\"，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；法学获评 A 级（全国前列），应用经济学获评 A-；法学为\"五院四系\"成员，应用经济学为财经类核心学科，对物理类考生报考法学、财经类专业有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类专业社会热度为\"推荐\"但明显 降温，电子信息/通信为\"高热推荐\"，电气工程及其自动化为\"高热推荐\"；金融/财经/经济类为\"分化观望\"；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 267900 人，较 2025 年约 252348 人增长约 6.16%，物理类考生按近年占比约 76.1%估算约 203872 人，较 2025 年 192096 人增长约 6.1%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；2026 年；该校位于湖北武汉，非本省高校；福建省考生对省外财经政法类 211 高校认可度较高，跨省报考热度稳定；该校在福建省招生占比约 3%–5%，属中等偏小规模招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 13403 名、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 12.16%、本省物理类考生增加约 6.1%、学校软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、物理类位次持续后移趋势等因素，扩招对位次后移有对冲作用，但考生规模扩大和位次后移惯性仍占主 导，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次较 2025 年继续后移，预测最低位次约 14501 名，区间 14001–15001 名。

一档（最难进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 14501 名，区间 14001–15001 名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 14000 名以内）可重点冲刺统计学类、计算机类、法学类等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（如 15000 名以外）建议以三档保底为主，谨慎选择一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6937→7723→10637→10972→13403, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6466 places over 5 years, averaging about 1600 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13403, with a clear backward trend; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian for Physics Category: 74 students in 2021–2022, 75 in 2023, 78 in 2024, 74 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 83 students, an expansion of about 12.16% compared to 2025, which has a notable mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been rising, from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting steady improvement in overall strength; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving a teacher ethics incident (a professor issued a 'self-criticism' due to failing assessment, raising doubts), which may have a mild inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 73, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded; Law is rated A-level (top nationally), Applied Economics is rated A-; Law is a member of the 'Five Academies and Four Departments', Applied Economics is a core discipline in finance and economics, attracting Physics Category candidates to apply for law and finance-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Computer Science majors is 'recommended' but significantly cooling; Electronic Information/Communication is 'highly recommended'; Electrical Engineering and Automation is 'highly recommended'; Finance/Economics/Economic majors are 'differentiated and wait-and-see'; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.16% from about 252,348 in 2025; Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 76.1% of the total, are about 203,872, an increase of about 6.1% from 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university; Fujian candidates have a high recognition of out-of-province 211 finance and law universities, with stable cross-province application popularity; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian is about 3%–5%, a moderately small-scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13403, a significant enrollment expansion of about 12.16% in 2026, a 6.1% increase in local Physics Category candidates, the university's rising Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), slightly negative reputation (mild inhibition), and the continuous backward trend of Physics Category rankings, the expansion offsets the backward shift to some extent, but the increase in candidate numbers and the inertia of the backward shift still dominate. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 14501, in the range of 14001–15001.

If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 14000), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like Statistics, Computer Science, and Law; if the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., outside 15000), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as safety and be cautious with popular Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1496→1647→1719→2254→1573, with a significant drop to 2254 in 2024 and a sharp rebound to 1573 in 2025, showing large fluctuations; the overall trend over the past 5 years has been volatile, with 2025 as the baseline ranking of about 1573; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian: 56 students from 2021 to 2023, 55 in 2024, reduced to 48 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 51 students, an expansion of about 6.25% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been rising, from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting steady improvement in comprehensive strength; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving a teacher ethics incident (a professor issued a 'self-criticism' due to failing assessment, raising doubts), which may mildly suppress some candidates' application intentions; Douyin popularity ranking is 73, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Law is rated A-level (top nationally), Applied Economics rated A-; Law is a member of the 'Five Schools and Four Departments', Applied Economics is a core discipline in finance and economics, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Law is 'recommended' (slightly hot), but has shown a trend of divergence and wait-and-see in recent years; the popularity of Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics majors is 'divergent and wait-and-see', with fierce competition for high-end positions; Accounting/Finance/Auditing is 'recommended'; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.16% from about 252,348 in 2025; History Category candidates, estimated at about 23.9% of the total, are about 64,028, an increase of about 6.3% from 60,252 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying competition; in 2026; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university; Fujian candidates have a high recognition of out-of-province 211 finance and law universities, with stable cross-provincial application enthusiasm; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian is about 3%–5%, making it a moderately small-scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1573, a slight enrollment expansion of 6.25% in 2026, an increase of about 6.3% in local History Category candidates, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhanced attractiveness), slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), and the hot popularity of flagship majors like Law, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1652, ranging from 1355 to 1949.
